# QR Freely

QR Freely is a free browser-only QR code generator. It creates QR codes locally for URLs, Wi-Fi networks, vCard contacts, email, phone, SMS, calendar events, geographic locations, and plain text.

## Primary URL

https://qrfreely.com/

## Capabilities

- Generate static QR codes without a hosted redirect.
- Create QR codes for websites, Wi-Fi, contacts, email, phone, SMS, events, locations, and text.
- Customize foreground, background, secondary color, finder marker color, dot style, finder style, quiet zone, logo size, border, and label.
- Download PNG or SVG.
- Run in the browser with no account, no upload step, and no runtime CDN dependency.

## Limitations

- Users should test printed QR codes, low-contrast colors, transparent backgrounds, and embedded logos with real scanners.
- Local generation means the browser handles the work.

## Useful search topics

free QR code generator, QR code generator no signup, Wi-Fi QR code generator, vCard QR code maker, QR code PNG download, QR code SVG download, QR code no redirect
